title: stachys hebens
intro: Stachys hebens, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its hairy leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stachys hebens include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and fever. Stachys hebens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
